title: Maersk, a bellwether for global trade, suspends two key shipping services due to Iran war
summary_full: The update comes as the Iran war enters its seventh day and the escalating regional conflict continues to disrupt global supply chains.
summary_public: The update comes as the Iran war enters its seventh day and the escalating regional conflict continues to disrupt global supply chains.
